chunks.title: Human Mining Achievements
chunks.reason: Describes the extent of human skill in extracting minerals and resources from the earth.

chunks.title: The Rarity of Wisdom
chunks.reason: Explores the difficulty of finding wisdom and its value compared to precious materials.

chunks.title: God's Knowledge and Definition of Wisdom
chunks.reason: Concludes that God alone knows wisdom's location and defines it as the fear of the Lord.
